zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Bohun於1311年4月3日出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾卡爾德可特時，她的父親Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford35歲，母親Elizabeth of Rhuddlan28歲。她於1325年8月11日與Hugh Courtenay III在英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1391年12月16日在英國英格蘭戴文波德哈姆享年80歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

variants.name: Moon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Moyon in La Manche. Compare   Mounce  .
Americanized form of German   Mohn   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Bohun was born on 3 April 1311, in Caldecote, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford, was 35 and her mother, Elizabeth of Rhuddlan, was 28. She married Hugh Courtenay III on 11 August 1325, in Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 16 December 1391, in Powderham, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80, and was buried in Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Bohun est née le 3 avril 1311, à Caldecote, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth of Rhuddlan, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh Courtenay III le 11 août 1325, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 décembre 1391, à Powderham, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterrée à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lei sposato Hugh Courtenay III il 11 agosto 1325, nel Exeter, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 6 figlie. ko.Westminster Abbey, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 웨스트민스터 웨스트민스터 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Bohun(이)가 1311년 4월 3일 영국 노르섬프토실르 캘데컷에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth of Rhuddlan(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1325년 8월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세터에서 Hugh Courtenay III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1391년 12월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 파우더함에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Bohun nasceu em 3 de abril de 1311, em Caldecote, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth of Rhuddlan, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh Courtenay III em 11 de agosto de 1325, em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de dezembro de 1391, em Powderham, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 80 anos, e foi sepultada em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Westminster Abbey, London, England: вестминстир эбби, вестминстир, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Bohun родилась 3 апреля 1311 г. в местности калдекот, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth of Rhuddlan, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Courtenay III 11 августа 1325 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 16 декабря 1391 г. в местности поудирам, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет и была похоронена в местности эксетир, девон, Англия, Великобритания.
